---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability for KoreX
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem statement
What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed solution
Describe the change you want.

## Area impacted
- [ ] core
- [ ] base
- [ ] android
- [ ] network
- [ ] data
- [ ] errors
- [ ] config
- [ ] notifications
- [ ] intents
- [ ] lifecycle
- [ ] testing
- [ ] SampleApp

## Public API impact
Explain whether this would change a public function, builder, DSL, or sample flow.

## Alternatives considered
List any alternatives or workarounds you evaluated.

## Additional context
Add examples, screenshots, or references if helpful.
